core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Google Docs structure x Swiss Grid precision
Content is King: The page is the stage, the UI is the orchestra pit
Tactile Utility: Tools should feel like physical switches, not flat text
Density with Breath: High-density toolbars, high-breathability canvas

layout.structure: Fixed Header + Scrollable Canvas + Floating/Fixed Sidebars

structure.top_row: Logo(Home) | Title(Editable) | Menus(File,Edit,View) | Spacer | LastEditStatus | CommentHistoryBtn | MeetBtn | ShareBtn | UserAvatar

styling.container: bg-white border-b border-slate-200 shadow-[0_2px_4px_rgba(0,0,0,0.02)] px-4 py-2 gap-2
styling.title_input: text-lg font-medium text-slate-900 hover:border hover:border-slate-300 rounded px-1.5 -ml-1.5 transition-colors
styling.menu_item: text-sm text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 px-2 py-1 rounded cursor-pointer
styling.toolbar_container: flex items-center gap-1.5 bg-[#EDF2FA] rounded-full px-2 py-1.5 mt-2 overflow-x-auto no-scrollbar
styling.toolbar_group: flex items-center gap-0.5 border-r border-slate-300/50 pr-2 mr-2 last:border-0 last:mr-0 last:pr-0
styling.toolbar_button: p-1.5 rounded hover:bg-[#D3E3FD] text-slate-700 data-[active=true]:bg-[#C2E7FF] data-[active=true]:text-[#001D35] transition-colors

styling.scroller: flex-1 overflow-y-auto h-full p-8 no-scrollbar scroll-smooth
styling.canvas_container: relative mx-auto min-h-[1056px] w-[816px] bg-white shadow-[0_4px_6px_-1px_rgba(0,0,0,0.1),0_2px_4px_-1px_rgba(0,0,0,0.06)] ring-1 ring-slate-900/5 rounded-sm px-12 py-12 transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out

styling.container: w-[300px] border-l border-slate-200 bg-white h-full flex flex-col shadow-[-4px_0_12px_rgba(0,0,0,0.02)]
styling.header: h-12 border-b border-slate-100 flex items-center justify-between px-4
styling.card: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg p-3 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow mb-3 cursor-pointer ring-offset-2 focus-within:ring-2 ring-blue-500/20

styling.drawer: fixed inset-y-0 z-50 w-80 bg-white shadow-2xl p-0 flex flex-col transition-transform duration-300 pointer-events-auto

PanelDrawer.behavior: Allow interaction with canvas even when panel is open (remove backdrop pointer-events)

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. HEADER REWRITE: Completely replace EditorHeader.jsx structure. Use two distinct rows: (1) Meta/Menu, (2) Toolbar. Use 'flex' and 'gap' utilities heavily.
2. TOOLBAR ICONS: Use Lucide icons. Group them logically: [Undo/Redo] | [Zoom] | [Text Style] | [Font Family/Size] | [Bold/Italic/Underline/Color] | [Link/Image/Comment] | [Align/List].
3. CANVAS: Ensure the editor canvas looks like a piece of paper (white, shadow, centered, fixed width) on a gray background.

4. SIDEBARS: Implement a 'Right Rail' for comments. Modify 'PanelDrawer' to allow interaction with the canvas (remove backdrop or make it non-blocking). Ideally, push the canvas or overlay without blocking.
5. TYPOGRAPHY: Switch headings to Work Sans (cleaner, sharper) and body to Inter.
6. PUBLISH VIEW: Ensure the published view also inherits some of this cleanliness but stays read-only.
7. DATA-TESTID: Preserve all data-testid attributes and add new ones for new toolbar buttons.
universal_guidelines: Ensure all buttons have hover/active states.
Respect the 'E1' persona: fusion of Swiss Grid precision and Google Docs utility.
